title: Fortified
body:
**Welcome to fortified.**
Fortified is a minecraft mod with the aim of letting you produce large industrial areas easily. It provides a plethora of different decorative blocks to imporove your builds. Plus, Fortified is survival-friendly, meanding that you can build right from the get-go. Here are some of the blocks:
- Industrial Lamp
- Concrete (+ Stairs & Walls) (Better MC concrete)
- Reinforced concrete (+ Stairs & Walls)
- Steel Truss
- Steel Ladder
- Concrete Pillar
- Reinforced concrete pillar
- **& Lots more!**
